name: Stadio Holdings Limited
summary: Stadio Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides higher education services in South Africa. It offers undergraduate programs, including higher certificates, diplomas, and degrees; and post-graduate programs comprising honors and masters degrees, and doctorate. The company provides teacher education for pre-school and primary school teachers; postgraduate accounting education services; higher certificates and master degrees in accounting program; and higher education qualifications for management, commerce, banking, financial planning and insurance, and public management; and higher education through distance learning focused on the leadership in management, business and commerce, and law and policing. As of December 31, 2020, it owned 6 registered higher education institutions. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Cape Town, South Africa. Stadio Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of PSG Alpha Investments Proprietary Limited.
